generated_oml:
instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Robot sensor measuring input current for precision machining processes"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance AngularVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Robot sensor measuring angular velocity for precision machining processes"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance PositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Robot sensor measuring position for precision machining processes"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
    base:desc "Input current data transmitted via MQTT with low-pass filtering for noise removal, serialized as JSON in hierarchical topics"
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngularVelocitySensor
    base:desc "Angular velocity data transmitted via MQTT with configurable read/write permissions, serialized as JSON"
]

instance PositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionSensor
    base:desc "Position data transmitted via MQTT with configurable read/write permissions, serialized as JSON"
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational trace of input current from robot sensors, processed for digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellExecutor, Thingsboard
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational trace of angular velocity from robot sensors, processed for digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellExecutor, Thingsboard
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational trace of position from robot sensors, processed for digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellExecutor, Thingsboard
]

instance Thingsboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Platform for data storage and visualization of robot sensor data in real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionMonitoringService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellExecutor : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell Executor for populating measured, simulated, and reference values into digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionMonitoringService
]

instance Simulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Physics-based simulation for dynamic modeling of robot joints and friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables DynamicModelAdaptationService, SimulativeProcessOptimizationService
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Systems Modeling Language for system architecture modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemArchitectureModelingService
]

instance AADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SAE standard Architecture Description Language for embedded systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemArchitectureModelingService
]

instance MontiArc : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component and connector architecture description language"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemArchitectureModelingService
]

instance Smardt : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Structured Modeling for Digital Twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemArchitectureModelingService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "General-purpose programming language for implementing digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionMonitoringService, DynamicModelAdaptationService, CuttingParameterOptimizationService, ProductQualityPredictionService, SimulativeProcessOptimizationService, PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance Java : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "General-purpose programming language for implementing digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionMonitoringService, DynamicModelAdaptationService, CuttingParameterOptimizationService, ProductQualityPredictionService, SimulativeProcessOptimizationService, PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance DataDrivenFrictionAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data-driven modeling approaches for black-box friction analysis using neural networks"
    DTDFVocab:enables ProductQualityPredictionService, PredictiveMaintenanceService, DynamicModelAdaptationService
]

instance RealTimeFrictionMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of friction behavior in robot joints and external forces for precision machining"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionMonitoringInsight
]

instance DynamicModelAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic adaptation of physics-based and data-driven models for accurate friction representation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAdaptationInsight
]

instance CuttingParameterOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of cutting parameters to reduce CO2 emissions in precision machining processes"
    DTDFVocab:provides CuttingParameterAdjustmentAction
]

instance ProductQualityPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Prediction of product quality based on real-time friction and machining data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ProductQualityInsight
]

instance SimulativeProcessOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulative optimization of machining processes prior to execution for CO2 reduction and quality improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ProcessOptimizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance using anomaly detection in friction behavior for industrial robots"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionAnomalyInsight
]

instance SystemArchitectureModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System architecture modeling for structural and functional properties"
    DTDFVocab:provides ArchitectureModelInsight
]

    base:desc "Real-time insight into friction behavior of robot joints and external forces for precision machining"
]

instance ModelAdaptationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into dynamic adaptation of physics-based and data-driven models for accurate friction representation"
]

    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of cutting parameters for CO2 reduction"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ProductQualityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction of product quality based on real-time friction and machining data"
]

instance ProcessOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from simulative process optimization prior to execution"
]

instance FrictionAnomalyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection in friction behavior for predictive maintenance"
]

instance ArchitectureModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into system architecture model for digital twin components"
]

    base:desc "MBSE methodology covering Requirements, Functions, Logics, and Physics phases"
]

instance OOSEM : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Object-Oriented Systems Engineering Methodology"
]

instance SPES : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "System Product Engineering and Support methodology"
]

instance ACME : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Architecture Description Language for system architecture modeling"
]

instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Precision machining environment for industrial robot operations"
    base:contains IndustrialRobotSystem
]

instance IndustrialRobotSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Industrial robot system for precision machining processes with dynamic friction behavior affecting positioning accuracy"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) as a central data repository, utilizing ThingsBoard for IoT data storage and visualization via MQTT protocol. It combines SysML structural models with Simulink behavioral models through the Functional Mock-up Interface (FMI) for multi-domain simulation. A pipeline automatically processes live robot data, executes simulation models, and updates the digital shadow in ThingsBoard for real-time monitoring and visualization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through traceability and verification of transformations (e.g., SysML to simulation models) and simulative experiments to validate before real-world execution. Uncertainty sources such as wear, temperature changes, and varying payloads are addressed by dynamically updating model parameters and retraining neural networks. Error detection mechanisms identify anomalies in friction behavior for predictive maintenance, while quality assurance processes include continuous validation against reference data and real-time adaptation to operational changes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Mosquitto broker) with publish-subscribe architecture for data transmission; hierarchical topic structure enabling message routing and access control via user-specific read/write permissions; ThingsBoard platform for data storage and visualization; secure communication through topic-based permissions."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems is achieved through standardized protocols including MQTT for real-time data streaming from IoT sensors, and the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) as an Industry 4.0 interoperability standard. Multi-domain model integration uses FMI (Functional Mock-up Interface) to combine SysML structural models with Simulink behavioral models, ensuring seamless data exchange and interoperability with enterprise systems and other digital twins."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards includes SysML [17] for systems engineering modeling, AADL [24] as an SAE standard for architecture analysis and design, ACME [23] for component-based system architecture, and MontiArc [25, 26] for robotic system modeling. These standards ensure interoperability and structured representation of system components and behaviors."
]
